summary: Iteration 78 - Platform Hardening Testing Complete. Backend: 35/35 tests passed (100%). All features verified: Health check with 8 services, Leitstelle with German status names, 9 Service Templates, Task escalate/cancel, .env.template exists, Stripe removed from requirements.txt. Frontend: Login flow (2-step), NeXify AI Leitstelle panel, Boilerplates page with 9 templates, OracleView German labels.

integration_issues.issue: Transient HTTP 500 error on Oracle dashboard API (Verbindungsfehler: HTTP 500) - appears intermittent

critical_code_review_comments: Health check endpoint correctly returns all 8 services: mongodb, supabase, deepseek, arcee, mem0, resend, revolut, workers
Leitstelle API returns German status names: erkannt, in_arbeit, wartend, in_loop, validiert_24h, fehlgeschlagen_24h, eskaliert
Service Templates system returns 9 templates with correct names and prices
Template instantiation creates projects with milestones and tasks correctly
Task escalation and cancellation endpoints working as expected
.env.template file exists at /app/backend/.env.template with documented keys
Stripe package is NOT in requirements.txt (confirmed removed)
NeXify AI page shows Leitstelle with Pipeline-Status, Aktive Agenten, Letzte Validierungen, Schnellaktionen, Verbindung
Boilerplates page displays all 9 service templates with prices and 'Projekt starten' buttons
OracleView shows German labels (Erkannt, In Bearbeitung, Validiert instead of Pending, Running, Completed)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Iter78_Customer project, TEST_Iter78_Escalate_Task_2, TEST_Iter78_Cancel_Task via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 78 verified all platform hardening features. Backend has 35 passing tests covering: Health check (8 services), Leitstelle (7 German status names), Service Templates (9 templates), Template detail, Template instantiation, Task escalate/cancel, .env.template existence, Stripe removal, Admin login. Frontend verified: 2-step login flow, NeXify AI Leitstelle panel (Pipeline-Status, Aktive Agenten, Letzte Validierungen, Schnellaktionen, Verbindung), Boilerplates page (9 templates with prices and Projekt starten buttons), OracleView German labels.

api_test_results.GET /api/admin/oracle/leitstelle: PASS - Returns pipeline with German status names
api_test_results.GET /api/admin/service-templates/growth_: PASS - Returns full template with milestones and agent_assignments

mocked_apis.note: All integrations are LIVE: Supabase PostgreSQL, DeepSeek LLM, Arcee AI (Master), mem0 Brain
